facebook.caption: Looking for a guided adventure in Phu Quoc? Kimie's Tours on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo comes highly rated by travelers who want to explore the island beyond the beach chair. Offering snorkeling, diving, and hiking trips, this small tour agency has earned a perfect 5-star rating across 260 reviews, which tells you a lot. Whether you want to discover vibrant coral reefs or trek through the national park, this is a solid starting point. Practical tip: book in advance, as spots fill up fast during peak season.
